# AEB Media

> AEB Media is a digital-marketing agency in Chicagoland, Illinois, founded by Alex Balan.
> We build custom growth systems for local businesses — social media content, Google Ads,
> Meta (Facebook/Instagram) Ads, web development, and AI/n8n marketing automation — serving
> home-services, fitness, and wellness businesses. Across client accounts our content and
> campaigns have generated over 127 million views.

Positioning: done-for-you content and systems that turn attention into revenue. No
cookie-cutter packages — we learn each business first, then combine only the services
that move the needle.

## Services

- [Social Media Content Production](https://aeb.media/services/social): Scroll-stopping reels, stories, and posts — scripted, filmed, edited, and posted for you.
- [Google Ads Management](https://aeb.media/services/google-ads): Show up the moment someone searches for what you offer. Clicks become paying clients.
- [Meta Ads Management](https://aeb.media/services/meta-ads): Targeted Facebook and Instagram campaigns that reach your ideal clients.
- [Web Development & Lead Gen](https://aeb.media/services/web): Fast, conversion-focused websites and landing pages that turn clicks into booked jobs.
- [AI & Marketing Automation](https://aeb.media/services/automation): Automated lead capture, instant follow-ups, appointment booking, and review collection.

- [Home](https://aeb.media/)

- [Contact](https://aeb.media/contact)
- [Free social media audit](https://aeb.media/free-audit): We analyze a local business's online presence and show exactly what's working, what's not, and how to get more clients. No strings attached.
